upstream.name: Evolith Core
upstream.maturityIndependence: UMS maturity is tracked independently from Core (Core lists Evolith UMS as maturityIncluded:false). Tenant mastership is held by MMS (writer-of-record, ADR-0106); UMS is a projection consumer.

waves.summary: UMS-owned items from the Evolith suite deployment strategy: two-writer tenant ownership (§12 M0-M4), verified consumer-correctness defects in the tenant-projection path (§5.5: inbox not wired, versioned-upsert race, Default/MasterDataDb fallback, startup-migration race), shared event-contract packaging (§11), and consumer observability (§14). Each DS-* maps 1:1 to a §15 risk row (DS-01/#1, DS-04/#4, DS-05/#5, DS-07/#7, DS-08/#8, DS-12/#12, DS-15/#15).

readiness.summary: UMS gap register created on the Evolith canonical gap-tracking design (UP-001): Board + Reference Catalog + Closure Evidence Standard (EN/ES) + closure-evidence registry + this maturity reconciliation, adopting the P0-P3 / XS-XL / backtick-status vocabularies, templated from the Evolith Tracker pilot.

Two-writer state: UMS still authors tenants locally (CreateTenantCommand + TenantEndpoints + PostgreSqlTenantRepository) against MMS mastership. The M0-M4 ownership migration ladder is not started; UMS does not yet read tenant identity from masterdata.tenant_projection.

Verified §5.5 defects in the tenant-projection consumer: the EF inbox is wired at bus level (DependencyInjection.cs:182) but not on the consumer endpoint (TenantProjectionConsumerDefinition never calls UseEntityFrameworkOutbox), so InboxState is never consulted; the versioned upsert is read-check-write without a concurrency token (permanent-regression race).

The projection DbContext resolves ConnectionStrings:MasterDataDb (DependencyInjection.cs:168) with a silent localhost fallback when unset; MasterDataDb is not set explicitly in the UMS chart. Startup migrations also run at boot and race at replicas>1 (no migrate-Job hook).

UMS keeps a verbatim local copy of the TenantEvent envelope (Ums.Infrastructure/MasterData/Contracts/TenantEvent.cs) instead of consuming the shared Evolith.Messaging.Contracts package (namespace Evolith.Contracts.MasterData); no producer-fixture contract test.

UMS ObservabilityExtensions misses AddSource("MassTransit") so consumer spans are invisible; standard projection meters (masterdata_projection_applied/discarded_total, consumer lag, _error queue depth) are not exposed.

tenantOwnership.detail: UMS still authors tenants locally against MMS mastership; M0-M4 migration not started.

projectionConsumer.detail: TenantProjectionConsumer + versioned upsert exist, but inbox is not wired on the endpoint and the upsert is read-check-write (race).

connectionConfig.detail: MasterDataDb resolved with silent localhost fallback; not set explicitly in the chart; migrations run at startup (replicas>1 race).

contractPackaging.detail: Verbatim local TenantEvent copy instead of the shared Evolith.Messaging.Contracts package; no contract test against producer fixtures.

observability.detail: No AddSource("MassTransit"); consumer spans invisible; standard projection meters not exposed.

overall.detail: Projection seam and tenant-ownership path require the DS-* hardening wave before staging promotion of projection features (§13 hard rule).
